job_location: Remote - Europe (Berlin, Cracow, Kyiv, Lisbon, London, Rome, Warsaw)

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Establish naming conventions and governance standards; Optimize DirectQuery and Import performance for financial datasets
evidence.domain_risk: Trader P&L, Global Position, Risk Metrics (VaR), and Financial Consolidation reporting
evidence.collaboration_width: Data Engineers; trading teams; risk teams; finance teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: lead the analytics and visualization components of a 26-week enterprise data warehouse implementation
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and construct Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models using Gold-layer data; Create DAX measures, hierarchies, relationships, and semantic structures; Engage directly with stakeholders to translate requirements into technical designs
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Trader P&L, Global Position, Risk Metrics (VaR), and Financial Consolidation reporting
evidence.autonomy_level: Support user enablement and UAT validation
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and construct Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models; Develop operational dashboards; Establish naming conventions and governance standards
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Designing, constructing, developing, and establishing new semantic models, dashboards, and governance standards are all greenfield verbs with no fix/scale language present.
evidence.ai_role: Design and construct Microsoft Fabric Semantic Models; Develop operational dashboards; lead analytics and visualization components
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Standard BI/analytics work with no AI tool usage or GenAI infrastructure building requirements
evidence.testing_framing: Support user enablement and UAT validation
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing mentioned passively as support activity, not as owned quality practice or listed tool
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Trader P&L, Global Position, Risk Metrics (VaR), and Financial Consolidation reporting; Establish naming conventions and governance standards
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Operational reliability focus in high-stakes financial/risk domain (VaR, trading) with governance emphasis, but no explicit compliance or regulatory framing
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Responsibilities emphasize governance, standardization, performance optimization, and quality with no velocity language present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Financial reporting and risk metrics for commodities trading directly impact financial decision-making and regulatory reporting.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Specific infrastructure project with defined outputs and timeline, building analytics on existing data layers rather than establishing the data function from zero.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Technical specificity in Fabric/DAX/performance optimization mixed with generic stakeholder collaboration language.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: All primary deliverables are financial metrics and reporting; role serves finance and trading teams in a financial reporting capacity.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role is scoped to a defined 26-week implementation project with support-oriented language ('support') and stakeholder-driven requirements, indicating execution within set parameters rather than strategic direction-setting.
